artifact.dragon-citadel.flamingFeather.d:
{Flaming Feather}

Level 4 or higher creatures gain +10 Attack, +10 Defense and +100 Health. The artifact neither changes nor upgrades creatures.
artifact.dragon-citadel.flamingFeather.e: Among the flames you find a feather of an ancient Phoenix. The fire does not burn; instead, it strengthens the mightiest creatures in your army.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.ca: Provides 4,000 gold per day. Only one Capitol may exist in the kingdom.
Adds two side arrow towers and doubles the base weekly creature growth.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.ci: Adds a moat and the main arrow tower, and increases weekly creature growth by 50%.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.dw: The first of two mutually exclusive dragon grottoes.
Allows recruitment of the original Storm Dragons.
An expensive lair that allows recruitment of Azure Dragons.
An alternative grotto that allows recruitment of Ruby Dragons.
Allows recruitment of Ancient Ruby Dragons.
Allows recruitment of ranged Storm Titans.
Allows recruitment of Ancient Faerie Dragons.
Allows recruitment of Ancient Rust Dragons.
Allows recruitment of Eternal Storm Dragons.
The highest sanctuary of the Ancient Azure Dragons.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.fo: Surrounds the town with defensive walls and opens the way to stronger fortifications.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.gr: Provides 5,000 gold per day, increases creature growth by 50%, and grants the defending hero +12 Spell Power.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.ma: Provides level 1 spells to visiting heroes who possess a spell book.
Adds level 2 spells. Learning them requires the appropriate Wisdom proficiency.
Adds level 3 spells. Learning them requires the appropriate Wisdom proficiency.
Adds level 4 spells. Learning them requires the appropriate Wisdom proficiency.
Adds the most powerful level 5 spells, available to masters of Wisdom.
Allows resources to be traded. Exchange rates improve with each marketplace owned.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.re: Provides 1 unit of mercury per day.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.sp: Allows artifacts to be bought and sold for resources.
Once per week, doubles a visiting hero's spell points up to 200% of their normal maximum.
Every 7 days, increases the player's current gold by 10%.
Each hero may visit the Academy once to gain 1,000 experience points.
Increases the town owner's daily income by 4,000 gold.
building.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.ta: Allows heroes to be recruited and increases the morale of troops defending the town by 1.
creatures.dragon-citadel.dcFirebird.name: Faerie Dragons
Faerie Dragon
faction.dragon-citadel.dragonCitadel.des: A monumental fortress of ancient beasts, titans and dragon lords. Every building is a major investment, but a completed Citadel fields an army powerful enough to make entire kingdoms tremble.
hero.dragon-citadel.billaden.biography: A dragon lord who combines the strength of ancient beasts with a talent for persuading even the most distrustful armies.
hero.dragon-citadel.billaden.name: Billaden
hero.dragon-citadel.billaden.specialty.d: Billaden gains a level-scaling bonus to Diplomacy.

mapObject.dragon-citadel.creatureBank.fl: The Flaming Feather is guarded by a council of dragons. Defeat them to claim the relic.
The sanctuary is empty and its fire has gone out.
The dragons have fallen. The Flaming Feather is now yours.
